title: Web + Admin pre-beta polish & bugfix batch

tasks.title: W3a: Add APART_HOTEL/ESTANCIA/BED_AND_BREAKFAST to enum + schema + DB migration
tasks.description: Add the 3 new accommodation types to AccommodationTypeEnum (packages/schemas/src/enums/accommodation-type.enum.ts). DB enum auto-derives via enumToTuple; generate + apply the ALTER TYPE migration (pnpm db:generate + db:migrate). Tests: enum unit test asserting the 3 values exist; migration applies on clean DB.

tasks.title: W3b: i18n labels + filter sidebars + seed for new accommodation types
tasks.description: Add es/en/pt labels under enums.accommodationType (common.json) and the accommodations.json types block for apart_hotel/estancia/bed_and_breakfast. Add the 3 options to the hardcoded types filter arrays in alojamientos/index.astro AND mapa.astro. Extend PooledAccommodationType in seed if seeding examples. Tests: i18n key-presence test (es/en/pt) for the 3 new label keys.

subtasks.title: Add options to both filter sidebars

tasks.title: W6: Fix destination accommodations page pagination.total
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/destinos/[slug]/alojamientos/index.astro:36 read result.data.pagination.total (and pagination.totalPages) instead of result.data.total. Mirror alojamientos/index.astro:203. Tests: component/integration test asserting it reads pagination.total; regression test for the undefined read.

tasks.title: W4: Diagnose + fix map view 500 on pan/zoom (bbox params)
tasks.description: Diagnose the real API error when useViewportSearch.ts calls accommodationsApi.list with bbox params; fix the param handling/validation in the accommodation list route so viewport search returns 200. Tests: API integration test with valid + invalid bbox bounds (invalid -> typed 4xx, never 500); regression for the failing case.

subtasks.title: Reproduce + capture the real API error

tasks.title: W11: Fix post category chip 404 (casing) + add missing sidebar categories
tasks.description: Normalize casing between post category chip hrefs (publicaciones/index.astro L285-293, uppercase) and the [category]/index.astro lookup map (lowercase keys) so chips resolve (no 404). Add the 7 missing enum categories (NIGHTLIFE, TRADITIONS, ART, BEACH, RURAL, FESTIVALS, GENERAL) to the sidebar filter. Tests: slug<->enum normalization unit test covering all 18 values; chip href resolves.

tasks.title: W8: Resolve I18nText for services filter on map view
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/mapa.astro (~L204/L211) wrap amenity/feature names with resolveI18nText(name, locale) for the filter options, matching index.astro (L401/L418). Fixes [object Object] chip labels. Tests: snapshot/unit test of the filter-options builder asserting string labels.

tasks.title: W2: Translate Better Auth signin credential errors
tasks.description: Map the relevant Better Auth error codes/messages to common.apiError.* i18n keys (es/en/pt) so credential errors (e.g. 'Invalid email or password') render localized in SignIn.client.tsx via translateApiError. Tests: unit test for translateApiError with Better Auth credential-error inputs across es/en/pt.

tasks.title: W9: Add AI entitlement i18n labels + fix Embedeer typo
tasks.description: Add ai_text_improve / ai_chat / ai_search keys to billing.json entitlement block (es/en/pt) and fix the can_embed_video 'Embedeer' typo. ES: 'Mejora de textos con IA', 'Consultas sobre el alojamiento con IA', 'Busqueda inteligente', 'Videos en tu publicacion'. Tests: i18n key-presence test for the 4 keys in all 3 locales.

tasks.title: W10: Translate price breakdown fee/discount labels
tasks.description: Add public fee/discount label i18n keys (es/en/pt accommodations.json) for all fee keys (cleaning, tax, lateCheckout, pets, bedlinen, towels, babyCrib, babyHighChair, extraBed, securityDeposit, extraGuest, parking, earlyCheckin, lateCheckin, luggageStorage, others) and discounts (weekly, monthly, lastMinute, others); use t() in PricingSidebar.astro instead of the raw key. Tests: fee/discount label resolver unit test + key-presence test.

tasks.title: W1: Proactive login CTA on AI search open for guests
tasks.description: For unauthenticated users, on AiSearchPanel.client.tsx open show the login message + sign-in/register CTA up front (reuse AuthRequiredPopover.client.tsx) and block the input/send (don't let them type+submit then redirect). Keep the AiSearchLoginPrompted PostHog event. Tests: component test - guest open shows CTA, input blocked, no API call.

tasks.title: W13: Remove keyword-search degradation fallback
tasks.description: Remove the 'Buscar por palabras clave' fallback button and the low-confidence 'mostrando resultados por palabras clave' notice from AiSearchPanel.client.tsx (~L351/L399/L407). On AI failure show only the error state. Tests: component test for error + low-confidence states asserting the fallback is gone.

tasks.title: W14: Autofocus chat/search input on open
tasks.description: Focus the textarea when the panel opens: AiSearchPanel/NlSearchInput (no autofocus today) and AiChatWidget.tsx (currently focuses the expand button first - focus the composer textarea instead). Tests: component test asserting document.activeElement is the textarea after open (both components).

subtasks.title: Accommodation chat focus textarea not expand button

tasks.title: W15b: Redirect already_host submit to own list
tasks.description: In CreatePropertyMiniForm.client.tsx the already_host branch (L354-358) currently sends admin users to the global /accommodations list; redirect to /me/accommodations (host's own list) instead. created/resumed already redirect correctly to the edit URL. Tests: component test for the already_host branch asserting the redirect target.

tasks.title: W5: Fix footer subscribe button stretch when authenticated
tasks.description: In NewsletterForm.module.css constrain .submitButton (align-self: flex-start or fixed height) so it doesn't stretch to the taller two-line .authedEmail sibling under .inputRow align-items: stretch. CSS-only; verify via design review across the authed/guest states.

tasks.title: W7: Fix hero wave flicker on resize
tasks.description: In HeroSection.astro replace .hero__bg-wave fixed height:160px with a fluid (clamp/percentage) height tracking the hero rhythm and add will-change: transform on the wave wrapper to avoid mid-reflow repaint flicker. CSS-only; verify by resizing.

tasks.title: W12: Fix sticky sidebar unreachable when taller than viewport
tasks.description: In DetailLayout.astro .detail-page__sidebar add max-height: calc(100vh - top-offset) and overflow-y: auto so the sticky sidebar scrolls independently when taller than the viewport. Shared layout (all entity detail pages). CSS-only; verify on a tall-sidebar detail page.

tasks.title: W15a: Fix publish form bottom spacing
tasks.description: In publicar/nueva.astro restore adequate bottom spacing on the form section (.nueva-form--compact overrides padding-block too small vs --space-section). CSS-only; verify the gap to the footer.

tasks.title: A1: Fix admin dialog close button size
tasks.description: In apps/admin/src/components/ui/dialog.tsx (L89) pass size="xs" (16px) or className="size-4" to <CloseIcon /> so the default close button renders at 16px (it defaults to 24px and the Tailwind selector doesn't match @repo/icons SVGs). Tests: component test asserting the close icon size class/prop.

tasks.title: A2: Register Playground IA sidebar icon
tasks.description: Register an appropriate icon (SparkleIcon or AskToAiIcon) in apps/admin/src/lib/nav-icon-map.ts (import + map entry) and point the ai-playground sidebar entry (config/ia/sidebars.ts) at it, so 'Playground IA' shows an icon. Tests: unit test asserting the nav icon resolves for the Playground entry.
